case_title: S.F.C.A. INC. VS VITUG. RINA A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $398.93 FILED BY S.F.C.A. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VITUG. RINA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F.C.A. INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VITUG. RINA A. $398.93 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $458.93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO VITUG RINA RETURNED MOVED- NOT FORWARDABLE;
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $7.64 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT VITUG. RINA A.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VITUG. RINA A.
